column2: Three-station PCB assembly line with two Stationary Assemblers and one Dexterous Robotic Arm. A single AMR shuttles parts to and from Central Store 60 m away (60 ticks at 1 m/s; each tick = 1 second). With buffer size 10 and the line consuming one part every ~10 ticks
column3: the AMR cannot fetch and deliver simultaneously — the line stalls periodically. Vary the AMR count to 2 and compare throughput.
